title: Anthology Writer Intake (one contributor / one chapter)
description: The locked intake contract for Skill 54. The four required fields are the inputs the pipeline consumes before any authoring (PRD §3.3). prove_aw_intake.py enforces required-field presence AND rejects credential-shaped keys fail-closed (D7): client provider keys are resolved per box from the client's own config, never taken through intake.

anthology_title.description: The book this chapter belongs to (for tonal + title fit).

first_name.description: Contributor first name. Names 'The {First} {Last} Tone' + labels the deliverable.

chapter_premise.description: The spine of this contributor's chapter — what it is about and the turn it makes.

personal_stories.description: Real lived anchors to place in the outline AND chapter. An array of short distinctive phrases (or objects with an 'anchor'/'summary'), OR the literal string 'N/A' when the contributor has none. Non-N/A anchors are provably placed.

subtitle_hint.description: Optional steer for the subtitle (may be 'N/A').

target_reader.description: Optional reader description, for tone fit.

tone_influences.description: Optional: up to 4 named public figures whose tone the blended voice draws on. 'N/A' slots are auto-picked from the avatar answers (tone-core R3).

email.description: Optional; captured for handoff parity only (dormant in the LLM path).

phone.description: Optional; captured for handoff parity only.

note_credentials_forbidden: Any key whose NAME looks like a secret (api_key, apikey, token, secret, bearer, password, openrouter, anthropic, openai, access_key, private_key, credential, auth_token) is REJECTED by prove_aw_intake.py (AF-AW-INTAKE-CREDENTIAL). Provider keys never ride intake.
